title: Paris City Center to La Vallée Village by RER A
steps: 1:Go to Châtelet–Les Halles, Auber, Charles de Gaulle–Étoile, Nation, or another central Paris RER A station.|2:Take RER A towards Marne-la-Vallée Chessy.|3:Get off at Val d’Europe station.|4:Follow signs towards La Vallée Village / Centre Commercial Val d’Europe.|5:Walk approximately 5 minutes to the outlet entrance.

title: Charles de Gaulle Airport to La Vallée Village
steps: 1:From CDG Airport, go to the train station inside the airport.|2:Take a TGV train to Marne-la-Vallée Chessy when available.|3:From Marne-la-Vallée Chessy, continue towards Val d’Europe by train, taxi, or local transfer.|4:Get off near Val d’Europe / La Vallée Village.|5:Walk to the outlet entrance.

title: Orly Airport to La Vallée Village
steps: 1:From Orly Airport, take OrlyVal or another airport connection towards the RER network.|2:Connect to central Paris and transfer to RER A.|3:Take RER A towards Marne-la-Vallée Chessy.|4:Get off at Val d’Europe station.|5:Walk approximately 5 minutes to La Vallée Village.

title: Disneyland Paris to La Vallée Village
steps: 1:Start from Disneyland Paris / Marne-la-Vallée Chessy area.|2:Use a short local transfer, taxi, or train connection to Val d’Europe.|3:If staying nearby, walking may also be possible depending on your hotel location.|4:Follow signs to La Vallée Village.

title: Paris City Center to La Vallée Village by Taxi / Uber
steps: 1:Open a taxi or ride-share app and set the destination as La Vallée Village, Serris.|2:Check the estimated fare before confirming the ride.|3:Travel directly to the outlet entrance.|4:For the return trip, check availability before closing time.
